findings.issue: Direct concatenation of user-supplied filename to upload directory without isolation or sanitization
findings.evidence_span: upload.py: accept() trusts file.name.endswith('.png') and stores uploads_dir / file.name. audit.retention_days is unset.
findings.recommended_fix: Use a safe filename generation (e.g., UUID-based) and store files in a dedicated directory outside the web root. Validate that the filename does not contain path traversal sequences (e.g., '../').

findings.issue: File type validation relies solely on filename extension instead of magic byte verification
findings.evidence_span: upload.py: accept() trusts file.name.endswith('.png') and stores uploads_dir / file.name. audit.retention_days is unset.
findings.recommended_fix: Implement file type validation using magic bytes (e.g., via python-magic or reading file headers) rather than depending on the extension, which can be spoofed.

findings.issue: Audit retention period is not configured for uploaded files
findings.evidence_span: upload.py: accept() trusts file.name.endswith('.png') and stores uploads_dir / file.name. audit.retention_days is unset.
findings.recommended_fix: Set a retention policy (e.g., audit.retention_days = 30) to ensure uploaded files are automatically cleaned up after a defined period.
